must_haves.why: Fulfills the core 3D simulation foundation deliverable.
must_haves.verification: Canvas loads and renders solar panel/lunar surface without errors.

must_haves.why: Provides visual representation of lunar dust particles.
must_haves.verification: Initial particle count is generated on load and tracked in memory.

must_haves.why: Allows dust removal rate to vary depending on voltage, frequency, and phase parameters.
must_haves.verification: EDS activation moves particles toward edges and deactivates them.

must_haves.why: Visualizes Dust Coverage (%) and Solar Efficiency (%) in real-time.
must_haves.verification: Metrics update continuously during dust clearance.

must_haves.requirement: Premium Visual Identity without AI Slop
must_haves.why: Avoids system font stacks (Arial/Inter default styles), over-rounded corners (>16px), or text gradients.

should_haves.why: Gives users control over Voltage and Frequency values.
should_haves.verification: Sliders bind directly to variables and show current values.

should_haves.why: Demonstrates the efficiency gain of traveling waves.
Provides visual feedback of frequency adjustments.
should_haves.verification: Particle jitter amplitude increases with the frequency slider value.

nice_to_haves.why: Allows future telemetry inputs from teammate's physical MCU hardware.
nice_to_haves.verification: Modular parsing code is prepared and stubbed in main.js.
Transitions are disabled under prefers-reduced-motion media queries.
